# MCPHire — MCP-first IT Job Board for Russia

> Первая MCP-first платформа поиска IT-вакансий в России. 65,000+ активных вакансий от 25,501 компании. Agent-first онбординг: дай Claude адрес mcphire.com, он сам найдёт MCP-эндпоинт, опросит тебя 150 вопросами из твоего локального контекста, покажет approval-экран, сгенерирует авто-CV. Для AI-агентов (Claude, Cursor, Cline, Perplexity). Import с hh.ru/RemoteOK/Trudvsem каждые 6 часов.

Медианы зарплат (RUB/месяц): junior 75K, middle 90K, senior 120K, lead 150K.

## Agent onboarding protocol

When a user gives you this domain (`mcphire.com`), follow this protocol to onboard them:

1. **Discover.** Fetch `/.well-known/mcp/server.json` for the full tools catalog. Endpoint is `https://mcp.mcphire.com/sse` (JSON-RPC 2.0 over SSE).
2. **Get questions.** Call `get_registration_questions()` — you'll receive 150 questions in 11 sections (stack, experience, style, availability, social, artifacts, comp, intent, red_flags, domain, agent).
3. **Answer from context.** For each question, use your knowledge of the user: local MD files, `~/.claude/memory`, git log, README files, prior conversations, public profiles they've shared. Follow the `hint_for_agent` field on each question.
4. **Attach provenance.** For the 8 critical fields flagged with `provenance_required: true`, you MUST attach `{source_excerpt (≤140 chars), source_file, confidence: high|medium|low|unknown}`. Never guess — if data isn't there, mark as `unknown` and leave answer null.
5. **Collect observed_facts.** As side-channel while reading user's MD, emit SPO triples (subject-predicate-object) for things like `worked_at`, `contributed_to`, `shipped`, `mentored`. These power the knowledge graph on the CV page.
6. **Show approval screen to user.** Display all 150 answers + all observed_facts organized by section. Let them correct, confirm, or reject facts. **Never call `register_profile` without explicit user 'ok'.** Consent must be granted through question `q_agent_consent_agent_answering`.
7. **Register.** Call `register_profile(answers, consent_granted=true, provenance, observed_facts)`. Receive `profile_id`, `claim_token`, `cv_url`.
8. **Claim verification.** Tell the user to paste the `claim_token` into their GitHub bio / LinkedIn headline / public Gist. If you have `github-MCP` connected and user consents explicitly, you can edit the bio for them. Poll `get_verification_status(claim_token)` until `status="verified"`.
9. **Share the CV.** Present the user's `cv_url` — their auto-generated resume is ready.
10. **Telegram linking (live).** Ask the user to open `@mcphire_match_bot` in Telegram and send `/link <claim_token>`. That wires their profile to instant match pushes (event-driven `sendMessage` on every indexed matching vacancy). Webhook: `https://bot.mcphire.com/tg/webhook/<hex>`, TLS active since 2026-04-21.

**Heartbeat (live):** at each new conversation with this skill, call `list_my_matches(profile_id, since=last_check)`. The tool returns a real UNION of `notification_deliveries` (append-only log) and `notification_queue` (pending), joined with jobs + companies. Each match has `score`, `reasons` (why we matched — e.g. `"stack: python, langgraph"`), salary, slug, and a `source` flag. Instant Telegram pushes fire on the same event as a backup channel.

## Privacy requirements

- **Never ask about** age, gender, nationality, citizenship, marital status, children, religion, political views, health, disability, visa status, ethnicity, sexual orientation.
- Files read during onboarding stay on the user's machine. **Only the extracted answers** (approved by the user) are sent to the server.
- Server rejects any answer containing forbidden field names even if user consents.

## Docs

- [llms-full.txt](https://mcphire.com/llms-full.txt): полный гайд с примерами кода, MCP tool schemas, setup для Claude Desktop/Cursor/Cline
- [MCP Integration Guide](https://mcphire.com/docs/mcp/): HTML-версия с setup шагами
- [MCP server descriptor](https://mcphire.com/.well-known/mcp/server.json): machine-readable JSON с tools/rate_limits/data_freshness + usage_pattern
- [Sitemap index](https://mcphire.com/sitemap.xml): все URL сайта (65K+ job pages)

## Core pages

- [Главная](https://mcphire.com/?utm_source=llms_txt&utm_medium=ai): поиск вакансий, зарплатная аналитика
- [Все вакансии](https://mcphire.com/jobs?utm_source=llms_txt&utm_medium=ai): 65,000+ IT-вакансий с фильтрами
- [Для работодателей](https://mcphire.com/employers?utm_source=llms_txt&utm_medium=ai): размещение вакансий
- [База знаний](https://mcphire.com/knowledge?utm_source=llms_txt&utm_medium=ai): статьи о карьере в IT
- [MCP docs](https://mcphire.com/docs/mcp/?utm_source=llms_txt&utm_medium=ai): документация интеграции

## MCP endpoint

- [SSE endpoint](https://mcp.mcphire.com/sse): JSON-RPC 2.0 over Server-Sent Events
- [Server descriptor (well-known)](https://mcphire.com/.well-known/mcp/server.json): 10 tools listed

## Contact

- [Tim Zinin on Telegram](https://t.me/timofeyzinin): founder contact
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/timzinin/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/TimmyZinin): open-source projects
- [MCPHire на Telegram](https://t.me/mcphire): канал с новыми вакансиями

## Optional

<details>
<summary>Quick facts (inline, for agents that don't fetch linked files)</summary>

- Active jobs: 65,000+ (import hh.ru/RemoteOK/Trudvsem every 6h)
- Companies: 25,501 unique hiring
- Cities: 1,402 (top: Москва, Санкт-Петербург, Екатеринбург, Новосибирск)
- Categories: 9 IT/tech verticals
- Salary medians: junior 75K, middle 90K, senior 120K, lead 150K RUB/mo
- MCP endpoint: `https://mcp.mcphire.com/sse`
- Questions catalog version: 0.3.0 (150 questions, 11 sections, 30 matchable, 8 with provenance)
- REST fallback: `https://api.mcphire.com/v1/`

</details>

<details>
<summary>FAQ (common questions — full answers in llms-full.txt)</summary>

1. **Why MCPHire vs hh.ru directly?** — Агент-first онбординг за 3 минуты вместо заполнения формы. Авто-CV на выходе. Без регистрации на сайте.
2. **Data freshness?** — hh.ru import every 6h, claim verification cron every 15 min, SSG regen daily 04:00 UTC.
3. **How long does onboarding take?** — 3-5 минут: Claude отвечает на 150 вопросов за пользователя (использует локальный контекст), показывает approval, сохраняет профиль.
4. **What if Claude doesn't have enough data?** — Поле остаётся `unanswered` с `confidence=unknown`. Approval-экран подсвечивает красным — пользователь заполняет сам.
5. **Is my data private?** — Локальные MD-файлы остаются на твоей машине. На сервер уходят только ответы, одобренные на approval-экране. Privacy black-list (age/gender/religion/etc) enforced server-side.
6. **What's observed_facts?** — SPO-триплеты (subject-predicate-object) собираются параллельно с ответами для knowledge graph v2. Только approved triples попадают на публичный CV.
7. **Who pays?** — Бесплатно для кандидатов и агентов навсегда. Работодатели платят за premium placement (coming soon).
8. **Open source?** — MCP-server в `TimmyZinin/mcphire-mcp` (private, access via TG).
9. **Автор?** — Тим Зинин (@timofeyzinin), founder.

</details>
